user_feedback:
when the game is paused, I don't want to see the game be grayed out or see any paused press esc to resume 

but I also don't want the hud/cursor/controls text to disappear when the game is paused
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused (PHASE_PAUSED), the HUD (Score and Coins display) disappears because renderUI(p) is not being called in the paused state. The game correctly renders without any gray overlay or pause text, but the UI elements are missing.

- Files affected: game.js

- Changes needed: Add renderUI(p) call in the PHASE_PAUSED branch to display the HUD while paused, maintaining visibility of score and coins without showing any pause overlay.
